Defines logging functions and macros for logging messages with file and line information.

# Purpose
This header file provides logging utility functions for C programs. It declares the function [`util_log`](<#util_log>), which logs a message along with the filename and line number where the log is called. The macro `UTIL_LOG` simplifies logging by automatically passing the current file name and line number to [`util_log`](<#util_log>). Additionally, the function [`util_dbgserial_str`](<#util_dbgserial_str>) is declared to send a string to a debug serial output. This file is intended to be included in other C source files to facilitate logging and debugging.
